title: Essential flows (v2)
summary: Does adding more information, including a value prop, increase flows adoption? No.
hypothesis: If we pre-create flows and encourage users to turn on flows with one click, we will drive flow publish rates + KAV generation from flows
results:
• +13.2% relative lift on view-to-click rate

  • No stat sig impact to view-to-launch rate i.e. adoption

results
learning:
Observations

Click rate is driven by accounts on the two ends of the spectrum:

  • Free, non-Flows users i.e. those entering empty state (+19.0% lift which is a +6.2 pp absolute increase).

  • These accounts also saw a +15.6% lift to adoption rate, indicating that the updated copy and design work particularly well for this cohort.

Paying accounts with “healthy” flows usage i.e. 3+ KAV generating flows (+22.0% lift which is a +1.1 pp absolute increase)

  • This is largely driven by incremental clicks on recommended Order Confirmation flows

  • A smaller portion of these accounts saw Welcome Series recommendation and drove incremental clicks as well as launches

Learnings

Updated copy and card design is effective in driving click rate BUT now we should explore more enhancements in the modal to drive adoption:

  • Explain choice of time delay and other flow configurations

  • Add a quick test button

  • More stats / social proof to push towards launching (e.g. X of your peers have launched this flow in the last Y days)

We can drive most impact by targeting new signups and free users with no flows usage – incorporate as an F2P lever or as a way to drive Marketing Agent adoption
treatment_description: Added 'Your personalized flows are ready to go'

treatments.label: Treatment
treatments.description: Added 'Your personalized flows are ready to go'
